name: Plan Motion
description: Plan a free-space (joint-interpolated) motion to a target using the given planner. Result is cached; trigger via `compute`.

inputParameters.name: planner
inputParameters.description: A planner that supports plan_motion (e.g. MoveItPlanner, PyBulletPlanner).

inputParameters.name: target
inputParameters.description: Target to reach (FrameTarget, PointAxisTarget, ConfigurationTarget, ConstraintSetTarget).

inputParameters.name: start_state
inputParameters.description: Starting RobotCellState. The robot's configuration in this state is used as the seed.

inputParameters.name: group
inputParameters.description: Planning group name. Defaults to the cell's main planning group.

inputParameters.name: planner_id
inputParameters.description: MoveIt planner algorithm name (e.g. 'RRTConnect', 'PRMstar'). Defaults to 'RRTConnect'.

inputParameters.name: num_planning_attempts
inputParameters.description: Number of randomized attempts to make. Defaults to 5 for MoveIt.

inputParameters.name: allowed_planning_time
inputParameters.description: Planning timeout in seconds. Defaults to 1.0.

inputParameters.name: compute
inputParameters.description: Trigger planning. Defaults to False so the canvas does not plan on every refresh.

outputParameters.name: trajectory
outputParameters.description: Resulting JointTrajectory, or a partial trajectory on planning failure.

outputParameters.name: error
outputParameters.description: Error message if planning failed; None on success.

outputParameters.name: planes
outputParameters.description: List of Rhino planes — one per trajectory point — at the planning group's end-effector frame (target_mode=ROBOT). Computed via FK on the planner with the start_state's attachments preserved.

outputParameters.name: polyline
outputParameters.description: Polyline connecting the plane origins in trajectory order. None when the trajectory has fewer than two points.
